riftEnergy.notes: Replaces mana. Ramp/drain/store supported via effects. Gameplay never requires SOL.

keywords.name: Ward
keywords.shortText: Blocks the next hostile spell or ability.
keywords.rules: While Ward is active, the next spell or activated ability that would affect this unit is prevented, then Ward is removed. Attack damage ignores Ward.
interactions: Echo copies do not inherit spent Ward

keywords.name: Corrupt
keywords.shortText: Drain 1 from a target; store as Void residue.
keywords.rules: When you Corrupt a target, deal 1 damage or reduce a buff by 1 (controller chooses legal mode). Gain 1 Void Residue (max 3) usable for Void cards.

keywords.name: Awaken
keywords.shortText: Transforms after a condition is met.
keywords.rules: When Awaken condition is met, replace this card with its awakened form (same board slot). Awaken is once per card instance.

keywords.name: Overflow
keywords.shortText: Excess healing or damage spills to neighbors.
keywords.rules: Healing beyond max HP becomes 1 damage to a random enemy. Damage beyond lethal becomes 1 damage to an adjacent enemy.

keywords.name: Riftbond
keywords.shortText: Links to your active Riftling companion.
keywords.rules: While Riftbond is active, this card gains +1/+1 if your companion shares its element. If companion is absent, draw a Companion token once.
interactions: Soulbind can pair two Riftbond units

keywords.name: Echo
keywords.shortText: May replay a cheap spell this turn.
keywords.rules: After you cast a spell costing 2 or less, you may Echo it once this turn at +1 energy (cannot Echo an Echo).

keywords.name: Bloom
keywords.shortText: Grows +1/+1 at dawn of your turn.
keywords.rules: At the start of your turn, this unit gains +1/+1. Bloom stacks. Silence removes future Bloom ticks.

keywords.name: Shatter
keywords.rules: Shatter removes Ward from the target, then deals 1 damage. If no Ward, deal 2 instead.
interactions: Crystal cards may Shatter for free once

keywords.name: Guardian
keywords.rules: Enemy attacks must target a Guardian if one is present (owner's side). Spells may ignore unless they say otherwise.

keywords.name: Soulbind
keywords.shortText: Pair two allies; share a keyword.
keywords.rules: Choose two allied units. They share one keyword you control until either leaves. If one dies, the other takes 1.
counterplay: Kill one to ping the other

keywords.name: Harmony
keywords.rules: If you control 2+ units of the same element, Harmony effects resolve twice.
interactions: Celestial counts as any for Harmony once/game

keywords.name: Charge
keywords.shortText: Can attack the turn it arrives.
keywords.rules: This unit may attack on the turn it enters play. Still subject to Guardian rules unless it also has a ignore clause.

keywords.name: Empower
keywords.shortText: Scales with spent Rift Energy this turn.
keywords.rules: Effects with Empower gain +1 for every 2 Rift Energy already spent this turn (after paying this card).

keywords.name: Ancient
keywords.rules: An Ancient effect can resolve only once per player per game for that card name.

heroes.name: Elara Venn
heroes.title: Road-Warden of the First Bond
heroes.biography: Walked deserts that had never met forests, carrying an egg that would teach the Commons its name.

ultimate.name: The First Road
ultimate.text: Ancient: put a Riftling from your deck into play exhausted.

heroes.visualIdentity: Travel cloak, satchel, egg-warm amber accents

heroes.name: Mira
heroes.title: Care-Warden of the Plaza
heroes.biography: Runs the softest shop in the hardest storms — teaches that survival is a deck you rebuild daily.

passive.name: Satchel Ready
passive.text: The first heal each turn also draws if you are behind on life.

ultimate.name: Soft Victory
ultimate.text: Ancient: fully heal your hero and grant Ward to all allies.

heroes.name: Kael
heroes.title: Forge-Warden
heroes.biography: Believes every blade should be a promise; every duel a tempering.

ultimate.name: White Heat
ultimate.text: Ancient: Empower your board — +2 Attack this turn.

heroes.visualIdentity: Scorched apron, ember eyes, iron shoulders

heroes.name: Captain Brine
heroes.title: Tide Warrant
heroes.biography: Privateer who only steals unfair advantages — keeps the rest for the crew.

passive.name: Fair Plunder
passive.text: When you Overflow, draw a card once/turn.

ultimate.name: Azure Claim
ultimate.text: Ancient: fill your board edges with 1/1 Spark Fragments.

heroes.visualIdentity: Coat with tide-cyan trim, crooked grin

heroes.name: Archivist Solen
heroes.title: Catalog of Fractures
heroes.biography: Maps every Rift event so no Keeper fights the same mistake twice.

passive.name: Index
passive.text: Spells cost 1 less for each Location you control (max 2).

effects.notes: spell discount

ultimate.name: Reprint Memory
ultimate.text: Ancient: Echo your last spell without surcharge.

heroes.visualIdentity: Spectacles, floating index cards, citadel gold

heroes.name: Nyx
heroes.title: Threshold Speaker
heroes.biography: Bargains with silence; teaches Corrupt as a language, not a crime.

ultimate.name: Eclipse Ledger
ultimate.text: Ancient: Silence the board, then deal 1 to all enemies.

heroes.name: Thorn Keeper
heroes.title: Elderwood Warden
heroes.biography: Talks to moss like neighbors; Bloom decks are just gardening with stakes.

ultimate.name: Season Turn
ultimate.text: Ancient: double Bloom stacks on your board.

heroes.name: Volta
heroes.title: Peak Ledger
heroes.biography: Counts lightning strikes for fun; Charge is just honesty about impatience.

passive.name: Static Index
passive.text: Charge units you play deal 1 on entry.

ultimate.name: Sky Writ
ultimate.text: Ancient: give Charge to your whole board.

heroes.name: Basalt
heroes.title: Gate of Stoneheart
heroes.biography: Moves like geology — slow until it isn't.

ultimate.name: Lock the Pass
ultimate.text: Ancient: summon two Guardian Pebblit tokens.

heroes.name: Lumen
heroes.title: Choir Lead
heroes.biography: Believes Harmony is not sameness — it is listening.

ultimate.name: Full Choir
ultimate.text: Ancient: set all ally elements to Light this turn for Harmony.

heroes.name: Cogmother
heroes.title: Alloy Tender
heroes.biography: Oils Gearlings like grandchildren; builds decks like machines that forgive.

passive.name: Spare Parts
passive.text: When a Metal unit dies, gain a Spark Fragment.

ultimate.name: Assembly Hymn
ultimate.text: Ancient: equip all allies with a temporary +1/+1.

heroes.name: Astral
heroes.title: Rift Astronomer
heroes.biography: Charts Celestial Rift openings like tides; mythic lines are just math with wonder.

passive.name: Orbit
passive.text: Once/game, Celestial counts as any element for Harmony.

effects.notes: once

ultimate.name: Open Gate
ultimate.text: Ancient: gain 3 energy and Awaken a unit.

expansions.name: Rise of the Rift
expansions.story: After the Fracture, Keepers gather in Riftwild Commons. The first formal Rift Duels teach that every conflict can be settled with Rift Energy rather than blades.

expansions.name: Frozen Kingdom
expansions.story: Frostveil Basin seals thaw — ice courts demand tribute in duels.

expansions.name: Pirates of Azure Bay
expansions.story: Moonwater Coast privateers wager packs on tide decks.

expansions.name: Shadow Eclipse
expansions.story: Void Hollow swallows daylight; Corrupt strategies peak.

expansions.name: Ancient Titans
expansions.story: Stoneheart Canyon wakes colossi that play as Locations.

expansions.name: Festival of Lanterns
expansions.story: Commons festival season — holiday frames and Harmony decks.

expansions.name: Crystal Wars
expansions.story: Radiant Citadel and Alloy Ruins contest Shatter protocols.

expansions.name: Dragon Rebellion
expansions.story: Miniature Riftwyrms refuse cages; legendary Awaken lines.
